lore.english:
Taimanin. Hails from the family that has traditionally served as the Fuuma clan's secretary. She passed down the role of secretary to Tokiko, and she goes out on missions as a Taimanin.

She used to be an active Taimanin, until she lost both of her legs in combat against demons. The former head of the clan, Danjo, saved her life on the brink of death, and the two went to UFS, where she was given mechanical prosthetic legs. However, when Danjo turned against the Taimanins, she left and sided with Asagi.

She utilizes her cyborg legs in combat. Furthermore, her Evil Eye allows her to take control of anyone who meets her gaze.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Blazing Kick[-]
skills.description:
Quickly kicks the enemy, attacking them 7 times.
Increases the duration of [V3:470102] [&Common_Word_Skill_Random] [&DeBuff](s) the target has by [V2:470102] turn(s) on [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionLast].

Quickly kicks the enemy, attacking them 7 times.
Increases the duration of [V3:470102] [&Common_Word_Skill_Random] [&DeBuff](s) the target has by [V2:470102] turn(s) on [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionLast].

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Hurricane Kick[-]
skills.description:
Knocks the enemy up into the air with a series of kicks, attacking them 5 times.
Increases [&Common_Word_Skill_CriticalRate] by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:470202]%)[-].
Removes all the [&DeBuff]s on the character [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionAfter].

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Shadowless Kick[-]
skills.description:
Runs toward the enemy and attacks with an axe kick.
Removes all [&Buff]s the target has.
When defeating an enemy with this skill, gains an additional turn.
